sourceNotes: Source follow-up pass 41 2026-05-28: direct Greek Travel Pages Erikoussa page supports Bragini/Brakini beach identity/location on Erikoussa. Confidence, coordinates, access, services, amenities, wind profile, and scoring were not changed.

Ionian medium-confidence cleanup 2026-06-05 DK: removed unsupported asphalt-road, parking, cafe/taverna and shallow-water claims for Bragini. GTP directly identifies Brakini east of Erikoussa and the community page mentions Brakini/Prangini context, but the evidence is still not enough for high confidence or exact access/service/depth claims at the stored coordinates. Terrain, coordinates, windProfile, scoring, photos and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.

orientation.notes: Generated from Natural Earth geospatial exposure facingDeg. This records shoreline-facing direction only; it does not verify shelter, low-wave behavior, or live sea conditions.

sourceNotes: Source follow-up pass 41 2026-05-28: direct Greek Travel Pages Erikoussa page supports Porto beach/settlement identity/location on Erikoussa. Confidence, coordinates, access, services, amenities, wind profile, and scoring were not changed.

Greek Travel Pages supports Porto as the south-coast Erikoussa settlement/port beach, describing a large shallow sandy beach at the settlement. Nearby settlement-service wording stays generic; no live condition claim was added.

Island confidence pass 2026-06-05: promoted to high for static beach facts only after reviewing direct island/beach source coverage for recorded access, terrain, depth, shade and service context. Source scenic/calm/clear wording was not imported into scoring, windProfile, photos, water-quality, or live condition claims.

orientation.notes: Generated from Natural Earth geospatial exposure facingDeg. This records shoreline-facing direction only; it does not verify shelter, low-wave behavior, or live sea conditions.
